channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Complaints Cleared in Preliminary House Review
item.description: Two impeachment complaints filed against Vice President Sara Duterte have passed a crucial second preliminary test in the House of Representatives. The House justice committee voted 54-1 to declare th...

item.title: British Columbia adopts permanent daylight time, prompting national debate on ending time changes
item.description: British Columbia has announced it will adopt permanent daylight saving time, with most of the province changing its clocks for the last time this weekend. Premier David Eby stated that the biannual cl...

item.title: Linguists explain perceived similarities between Irish and Jamaican accents amid viral video of Irish politician
item.description: A recent speech by Thomas Gould, a Sinn Féin TD from Cork, in the Irish parliament went viral online, with many viewers, particularly from Jamaica and other Caribbean communities, noting striking simi...

item.title: Kenyans gather in Nairobi to honour late Emurua Dikirr MP Johana Ng’eno at requiem mass
item.description: The article reports on a solemn requiem mass held in Nairobi for the late Emurua Dikirr Member of Parliament, Johana Ng’eno, who died in a tragic helicopter crash alongside several others in Nandi Cou...

item.title: EFCC Continues Investigation Into Abia State Airport Project – Otti
item.description: Abia State Governor, Alex Otti, don confirm say the investigation into the controversial ?10 billion Abia airport project still dey go on. EFCC never close the matter, as dem still dey invite people w...

item.title: Study Shows Shared Experience in Trauma Teams Improves Patient Recovery Times Through Better Coordination
item.description: A new study conducted at UPMC Presbyterian, Pennsylvania's largest major trauma center in Pittsburgh, reveals that trauma resuscitation teams perform better and help patients recover faster when team ...

item.title: Minister emphasizes electricity access as key for women’s education and economic participation
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the Minister for Community Development, Gender, Women and Special Groups, Dorothy Gwajima, has highlighted the importance of reliable energy for women’s development and achieving gen...

item.title: Punjab Government Withdraws Controversial Land Pooling Policy 2025 After Farmers' Protests and High Court Stay
item.description: In mid-May 2025, the Bhagwant Mann-led Aam Aadmi Party government in Punjab introduced the Land Pooling Policy (LPP) 2025, a plan to assemble around 65,533 acres of land – mostly farmland – for large-...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif briefs parliamentary leaders on Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions, Iran developments and Middle East conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif chaired an important closed-door meeting in Islamabad on Wednesday with leaders and representatives from various political parties to discuss the evolving regional securi...

item.title: SADC Holds Meeting to Review Progress on 2020–2030 Development Plan
item.description: On 4th March 2026, the meeting of Chief Secretaries and Senior Officials from SADC member states started in Pretoria, South Africa. The main agenda is to implement the 2020–2030 Regional Indicative St...

item.title: Palawan Residents Face Extreme Heat with 42°C Heat Index
item.description: Residents of Coron, Palawan are expected to experience a ‘danger level’ heat index reaching 42 degrees Celsius today, the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (...

item.title: Tinubu Orders Suspension of FAAN Cashless Airport System After Traffic Chaos at Major Airports
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don order make Aviation Minister Festus Keyamo suspend the new cashless payment policy wey the Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria (FAAN) just start. The policy wey begin on Ma...

item.title: Top Silk Pillowcases for Skin and Hair Health: Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Silk pillowcases are more than a luxury; they can significantly benefit both skin and hair. According to experts, silk helps retain skin moisture, reduces friction, and can minimise fine lines and irr...

item.title: 2026 Women’s Prize for Fiction Longlist Highlights Diverse Stories by Contemporary Women Authors
item.description: The longlist for the 2026 Women’s Prize for Fiction has been announced, featuring sixteen novels that explore a wide range of human experiences. Chaired by Julia Gillard, former prime minister of Aust...

item.title: James Talarico Wins Texas Democratic Senate Primary, Faces Challenge of Uniting Party
item.description: James Talarico, a 36-year-old Texas state representative and aspiring Presbyterian minister, secured the Democratic nomination for the U.S. Senate after a competitive primary against U.S. Rep. Jasmine...

item.title: Manly apartment of ex-Olympian Ian Brown listed for $12.5 million with waterfront features
item.description: A rare waterfront apartment in Manly, Sydney, formerly owned by Olympian sailor Ian Brown, has been listed for sale with a price guide of $12.5 to $13.75 million. The property is described as a 'house...

item.title: Centre to Decide Speed Limits on National Highways, States to Manage Local Roads
item.description: The Ministry of Road Transport has proposed that the authority to set speed limits on National Highways (NHs) and expressways be centralised under the Centre, while state governments will continue to ...

item.title: Tanzania Defends Its Handling of 2025 Election Violence at UN Human Rights Council
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has strongly rejected what it calls biased and incomplete statements made by several international partners and human rights organisations concerning violence linked to the ...

item.title: London Council Approves 30-Storey Residential Tower on Ridout Street Despite Tenant Concerns
item.description: The London City Council has approved a plan for a 30-storey high-rise building on Ridout Street, which will include 1,500 residential units and 136 parking spaces. The decision comes amid concerns fro...

item.title: Tanzania Boxing Achieves Milestone with Certified Coaches and Referee
item.description: Tanzania amateur boxing has just scored a big milestone for its technical side. Over 40 local coaches now hold international certifications, which is a major shift since before, Tanzanian boxers had t...
